rationale: The platform is a multi-tenant automotive and financial SaaS. It requires authority, clarity, and rapid scanability. A dense, high-contrast, function-first layout is ideal for handling inventory KPIs, financial costs, and sales objectives across multiple agencies.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Dense spacing for data tables and charts. Mobile-first responsive.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat solid background (`bg-card`), 1px subtle border (`border-border/40`), no drop shadows by default. Use sharp or slightly rounded corners (`rounded-md` max).
surfaces_and_borders.header: Solid background (`bg-background`) with a hard 1px bottom border (`border-b border-border/40`). Avoid glassmorphism to keep data crisp.
surfaces_and_borders.hover_states: Slight lift (`-translate-y-px`) with subtle shadow (`shadow-sm`) and darker border on interactive cards.

components_instructions.buttons: Square or minimally rounded corners. High contrast. Primary uses Deep Blue (`#002FA7`), secondary uses solid border with transparent background. Explicit hover states (e.g., `hover:bg-primary/90`).
components_instructions.tables: Shadcn UI tables, dense padding. Left-align text, right-align numbers. Use alternating row colors or strict bottom borders for readability.
components_instructions.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn UI forms. Sharp borders, clear focus rings (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-1`).
components_instructions.charts: Shadcn or Recharts. Ensure tooltips have solid backgrounds and clear text. Use specific chart colors provided.
components_instructions.badges: Use for aging alerts and status. Hard borders with tinted backgrounds (e.g., red for high aging, green for sold).

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast, crisp transitions (0.15s ease-out) for all hover and focus states.
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Use skeleton loaders matching table/card dimensions. No playful spinners.
motion_and_interactions.charts_animation: Subtle grow-in effect on mount, but prioritize performance.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: MANDATORY: All key elements (buttons, inputs, charts, metric cards) must include descriptive `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-btn'`, `data-testid='kpi-aging-card'`).

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Size 16px to 24px depending on context.

login_background.description: Modern interior of a car dealership featuring a light blue SUV. Use as the hero/split-screen background for the Login and Onboarding screens with a dark overlay to maintain text readability.

agency_logo_1.description: Qarea brand logo on a glass sign. Use as a placeholder for a specific car agency logo in the multi-tenant dashboard dropdowns or headers.

agency_logo_2.description: Vibrant abstract logo design. Use as a secondary placeholder logo for another agency/brand within the dashboard's cross-agency view.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts: `Cabinet Grotesk` (Headings) and `IBM Plex Sans` (Body).
Implement a dense, 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard to view inventory, aging, and costs simultaneously.
Do not use card drop-shadows heavily; rely on 1px borders (`border-border`) to separate content.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away excessive roundness; max border-radius should be `md` (4px to 6px) to match the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.
In multi-tenant views, clearly distinguish the active agency/brand in the header using the placeholder logos provided.
